title: Feral strength + manic focus — micro-creed, Oct 2025
html:
TL;DR

  • Six-line micro-creed Yahir wrote himself Oct 14 2025 — about a month into the Austin move and the gym-job-as-bridge era.
  • Lines:
    • "A regular job will not make you rich."
    • "You have the potential to fucking unleash and do legacy work."
    • "You are willing to go farther and deeper than anytime all the time."
    • "I walk with God's eyes, we all do, but we have a choice to use them or not."
    • "Do what you feel absolutely most compelled to do and be with. It should feel like gravity."
    • "Feral strength and manic focus."

Key quote

"Feral strength and manic focus."

Why it matters in the graph

  • Defining articulation of the walk with gods eyes concept — "we all do, but we have a choice to use them or not" turns the line from a personal mantra into a claim about everyone.
  • "Feral strength and manic focus" is the most compressed self-description in the corpus and a direct heir to:
    • 2024 09 26 top anime hype scene (anime canon = berserker-transcendence).
    • 2026 02 26 i want to be the motherfucker ("pure soul fire").
    • soul as beacon concept.
  • "Should feel like gravity" — the partner/work-pull frame Yahir uses; pairs with 2024 10 06 thoughts untitled "don't let life happen to you, shift to letting it happen for you."
  • "A regular job will not make you rich" is the operating principle behind the gym-job-as-bridge-not-destiny stance Yahir holds in Memory.

Open questions

  • Does "feral strength and manic focus" recur as a tagline anywhere? Worth searching for product-copy use.

Wikilinks

walk with gods eyes · soul as beacon · austin tx · 2024 09 26 top anime hype scene · 2026 02 26 i want to be the motherfucker · 2024 10 06 thoughts untitled · Memory
